scope: Phase 3 UMI - analysis assumptions for Phigros

notes.combo_definition: judge-line based hit objects (time_beats, positionX, holdTime)

tips.rationale: Phigros provides geometry-native judge-line data with precise timing and spatial information, enabling high-quality, deterministic movement and timing tips once mapped to element taxonomy.

table.name: adapter-validator canonical kinds alignment
table.expected: All emitted kinds must be within allowed canonical kinds

table.name: geometry-native scope enforcement
table.expected: No gameplay difficulty inference; geometry/timing only

table.name: tips enablement gate
table.expected: Tips generation must respect Phase 4 gating and taxonomy availability

consistency_checks.notes: Phigros consistency checks emphasize geometry-native correctness and scope safety rather than BPM or DB parity.
